summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ceylon Canvas Art Marketplace. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with minor UI interaction issues. All core marketplace features working including artwork browsing, artist profiles, bidding, cart, and authentication.

ui_bugs.issue: Artist checkbox not clickable due to overlay interception
No error message displayed for invalid credentials

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, featured, categories, artists)
Gallery page with filters, search, sorting functionality
Artwork detail page with bidding interface
All backend API endpoints (63/63 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix registration form checkbox overlay issue preventing artist selection. Consider adding error message display for login form validation.
